summary: Iteration 26: Complete testing of Campaigns CRUD + Social Post Linking (P1) and Social Dashboard Consolidated (P2). Backend 100% passed (22/22 tests), Frontend 100% passed. All features working correctly.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/brands/{brand_id}/campaigns requires auth (401)
Backend: POST /api/brands/{brand_id}/campaigns requires auth (401)
Backend: PUT /api/brands/{brand_id}/campaigns/{campaign_id} requires auth (401)
Backend: DELETE /api/brands/{brand_id}/campaigns/{campaign_id} requires auth (401)
Backend: GET /api/brands/{brand_id}/campaigns returns array of campaigns
Backend: POST /api/brands/{brand_id}/campaigns creates campaign with title, type, dates, budget
Backend: PUT /api/brands/{brand_id}/campaigns/{campaign_id} updates campaign fields
Backend: PUT with invalid campaign_id returns 404
Backend: DELETE /api/brands/{brand_id}/campaigns/{campaign_id} deletes campaign
Backend: DELETE with invalid campaign_id returns 404
Backend: POST link-post requires auth (401)
Backend: POST link-post returns 400 when mention_id missing
Backend: POST link-post returns 404 for invalid mention
Backend: GET campaign posts requires auth (401)
Backend: GET /api/brands/{brand_id}/campaigns/{campaign_id}/posts returns posts and totals structure
Backend: GET campaign posts returns 404 for invalid campaign_id
Backend: DELETE unlink-post requires auth (401)
Backend: DELETE unlink-post works (idempotent operation)
Backend: GET /api/brands/{brand_id}/social-dashboard requires auth (401)
Backend: GET social-dashboard returns consolidated metrics structure (total_followers, total_engagement, platforms, recent_posts, top_posts, connected_count)
Backend: Social dashboard returns connected_count=0 when no platforms connected
Backend: Test campaign camp_97532ec08752 exists
Frontend: Campaigns page loads with data-testid='campaigns-page'
Frontend: New Campaign button visible (data-testid='new-campaign-btn')
Frontend: Campaign form has all required fields (title, start_date, end_date, type, budget, goals, description)
Frontend: Campaign creation works - success toast 'Campanha criada!' shown
Frontend: Campaign list shows campaigns with calendar view
Frontend: Campaign detail view loads with engagement metrics (Curtidas, Comentários, Compartilhamentos, Visualizações)
Frontend: Link Post button visible in detail view (data-testid='link-post-btn')
Frontend: Link post dialog opens correctly
Frontend: Link post dialog shows 'Nenhum post disponível' when no social posts (correct behavior)
Frontend: Back to list button works (data-testid='back-to-list-btn')
Frontend: Social dashboard widget hidden on Dashboard when connected_count=0 (correct behavior)
critical_code_review_comments: campaigns.py: Full CRUD implementation with proper auth via Depends(get_current_user)
campaigns.py: linked_posts stored as array of mention_id strings, uses $addToSet for linking and $pull for unlinking
campaigns.py: get_campaign_posts (line 96-121) correctly aggregates engagement totals from linked social_mentions
social_fetcher.py: social-dashboard endpoint (line 497-578) properly aggregates all social_profiles and social_mentions with source='api'
social_fetcher.py: Returns connected_count based on profiles count, allowing frontend to hide widget when 0
Campaigns.js: Complete UI with calendar view, form modal, detail view, and link post dialog
Campaigns.js: CampaignDetail component (line 437-534) shows engagement totals and linked posts with unlink functionality
Dashboard.js: Social dashboard widget (line 522-601) correctly hidden when socialDash is null or connected_count=0
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_Playwright_Campaign during frontend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 tested: 1) Campaign CRUD - full create/read/update/delete working, 2) Campaign post linking - link-post requires valid mention_id, returns 404 for invalid, unlink-post is idempotent, 3) get_campaign_posts returns posts array with engagement totals, 4) social-dashboard endpoint returns consolidated metrics (total_followers, total_engagement, platforms, recent_posts, top_posts, connected_count), 5) Frontend Campaigns page has calendar view, form modal, detail view with engagement metrics, link post dialog, 6) Social dashboard widget on Dashboard is correctly hidden when no social profiles connected (connected_count=0). NO MOCKED APIs - all endpoints are real. Test campaign camp_97532ec08752 exists for testing.
notes: All P1 (Campanhas + Social Posts) and P2 (Dashboard Social Consolidado) features working correctly. Social platforms are NOT connected in test environment, so social-dashboard returns connected_count=0 and the widget is correctly hidden on Dashboard. Link post dialog shows appropriate message when no posts available. Campaign CRUD fully functional with calendar visualization.
